chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1211 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025 *** None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. This petition was instituted in the year 2020, however, since its inception no one is pursuing it, which prima facie reflects that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
